name: soundvault
description: Sistema de Gestión de Inventario de Audio - Iglesia & Estudio de Grabación

scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.db:push: cd server && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
